title: Man and Wife
author: Tony Parsons
description: A Novel About Love And Marriage About Why We Fall In Love And Why We Marry; About Why We Stay And Why We Go. Harry Silver Returns To Face Life In The 'Blended Family'. This Wonderful New Novel About Modern Times Can Be Read As A Sequel To The Million-Selling Man And Boy Or Completely On Its Own. Harry Silver Is A Man Coming To Terms With A Divorce And A New Marriage. He Has To Juggle With Time And Relationships, With His Wife And His Ex-Wife, His Son And His Stepdaughter, His Own Work And His Wi
